name: Default Ontology
description: General-purpose entity and relationship types suitable for business documents

entityTypes.name: Person
entityTypes.description: A named individual — employee, author, stakeholder, or public figure

entityTypes.name: Organization
entityTypes.description: A company, institution, department, team, or named group

entityTypes.name: Location
entityTypes.description: A geographic place — city, country, region, address, or facility

entityTypes.name: Date
entityTypes.description: A specific date, date range, or time reference

entityTypes.name: Concept
entityTypes.description: An abstract idea, topic, methodology, strategy, or domain term

entityTypes.name: Event
entityTypes.description: A specific occurrence — meeting, incident, milestone, launch, or decision

entityTypes.name: Document
entityTypes.description: A referenced document, report, agreement, or publication

entityTypes.name: Metric
entityTypes.description: A quantitative measurement, KPI, statistic, or financial figure

entityTypes.name: Product
entityTypes.description: A product, service, feature, tool, or technology offering

entityTypes.name: Technology
entityTypes.description: A technology, framework, standard, protocol, or technical system

relationshipTypes.name: works_at
relationshipTypes.description: A person is employed by or affiliated with an organization

relationshipTypes.name: located_in
relationshipTypes.description: An entity is physically located in or headquartered in a place

relationshipTypes.name: occurred_on
relationshipTypes.description: An event happened on a specific date

relationshipTypes.name: authored_by
relationshipTypes.description: A document was written or created by a person

relationshipTypes.name: mentions
relationshipTypes.description: A document or section references an entity

relationshipTypes.name: part_of
relationshipTypes.description: An entity belongs to or is a subdivision of another entity

relationshipTypes.name: related_to
relationshipTypes.description: A general semantic relationship between two entities

relationshipTypes.name: caused_by
relationshipTypes.description: An event or outcome was caused or triggered by another entity or event

relationshipTypes.name: depends_on
relationshipTypes.description: An entity requires or depends on another entity

relationshipTypes.name: measured_by
relationshipTypes.description: A concept or entity is quantified by a specific metric

relationshipTypes.name: uses
relationshipTypes.description: An entity employs or utilizes a technology or product

relationshipTypes.name: competes_with
relationshipTypes.description: Two organizations or products are competitors
